final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] in,
    output [3:0] result
);assign result[0] = |in[3:0];   // OR of first four inputs
    assign result[1] = &in[3:0];   // AND of first four inputs
    assign result[2] = |in[7:4];   // OR of last four inputs
    assign result[3] = &in[7:4];   // AND of last four inputs

endmodule
